this.address.name

this.address.type ? 'Contract' : 'Wallet'

this.address.a

'info'

this.address.balance + ' ETH'

'Incoming tx' + `(${this.address.txTo.length})`

'Outgoing tx' + `(${this.address.txFrom.length})`

'SELECT ADDRESS TO DISPLAY'

item.name||item.as `${item.pathsTo} / ${item.pathsFrom} / ${item.numChainPaths}`

this.title

'Please connect you wallet to begin.'

'No provider was detected.'

'Please make sure you have Metamask installed in your browser.'

'Block:'this.stats.blockN

'Tx count:'this.stats.txCount

'Wallets:'this.stats.walletAddrs

'Contracts:'this.stats.contractAddrs

this.value
this.value

item[this.d].name||item[this.d].as item.amount
